hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 630 m from property

address.address1: 15, Jl. Khairil Anwar No.15-19, Banda Aceh

usefulInfo.name: Breakfast charge (unless included in room price)

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. As an added bonus, fitness center is provided on-site to conveniently serve your needs.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

adult: Guests 6 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: For new customers that looking budget hotel.. this is really not worth the money. Please consider other places instead of oyo, their service and mgment is bad and what u see at website is not what u get when u reach there

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Hi Denny, Thank you for taking out your valuable time to rate us. It seems that you are not completely satisfied with our services and we will surely put in our best effort to keep up with your expectations in the future. Regards, Joey

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Thank you for rating us, Wan, We have duly noted your feedback and ensure better services in the future. Regards, Joey
comments.reviewComments:
The location is great. It is walking distance to top Mi Acheh restaurant in Banda Acheh called Mie Razali (right of hotel) and it is also walking distance to Rex (usually open for business in the evening), where we ate Sate Matang.
WiFi was great but we had water problems the next day. Other than that, great!
comments.reviewTitle: Great place to stay on a budget
